privileged_info_summary: Task operates on synthetically generated timber cruise data for 80 trees across 10 plots in a 40-acre stand using variable-radius plot sampling with BAF=20. Verified parameters include: output file path (C:\Users\Docker\Documents\timber_cruise.xlsx), stand size (40 acres), number of plots (10), and tolerance values (5% for volume and currency). Species are real Pacific Northwest species (Douglas-fir, Western hemlock, Western red cedar, Red alder). Volume equation coefficient b1 for Douglas-fir (0.01838) is a standard timber measurement constant. Coefficients b0 values and species prices appear to be task-specific custom values not found in accessible forestry literature. 2024 Oregon Department of Forestry data shows average stumpage prices of $518/MBF (lower than the $650/MBF claimed for Douglas-fir in this task).
